purpose: Pre-stage ALM r13 + 4-path Φ measurement corpus shards on R2 so each H100×4 pod (#83) can pull/extract instead of repeating per-pod local upload.
roadmap_link: #83 H100 × 4 (track_relation: ALM r13 corpus + 4-path Φ measurement corpus)

compression.rationale: JSONL is highly compressible (text); level 19 maximizes ratio for cold-storage shards downloaded once per pod

alm_r13.description: ALM r13 v1 base corpus (840 lines, 7-category) + audit + manifest + bt_stats + 4-gate pass subset + tier curriculum slices

p1_corpus.description: Φ 4-path substrate p1 (Qwen/Qwen3-8B) tokenized r13 corpus + path-tokenized manifest

p2_corpus.description: Φ 4-path substrate p2 (meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B via unsloth mirror) tokenized r13 corpus + path-tokenized manifest

p3_corpus.description: Φ 4-path substrate p3 (mistralai/Ministral-3-14B-Base-2512) tokenized r13 corpus + path-tokenized manifest

p4_corpus.description: Φ 4-path substrate p4 (google/gemma-4-31B) tokenized r13 corpus + path-tokenized manifest. Token IDs identical to Gemma-3 (rename-only migration).

estimated_total_mb_note: Sum of est_size_mb across shards. Conservative ~33% ratio for highly compressible JSONL; actual zstd -19 ratio may reach ~20%.

pod_consumer_protocol.step_3_verify: sha256sum + line-count vs manifest primary_sha256 / lines
pod_consumer_protocol.rationale: single download per pod (~4 MB total) replaces per-pod re-upload of source repo paths; ~10x faster cold-start
